tenant_rules.rule: all tenant-owned tables must include CustomerId
tenant_rules.query_rule: all SQL must explicitly include WHERE CustomerId = @CustomerId
tenant_rules.pre_auth_exception: Pre-authentication queries (FindUserByEmail, FindValidRefreshToken) identify the global user identity only. They do NOT resolve tenant context. CustomerId is NOT required in these queries. After auth, tenant context MUST be resolved explicitly — either auto-selected (single membership) or explicitly chosen (multiple memberships).

identity_model.email_uniqueness: global — UIX_Users_Email must remain a global unique index with no CustomerId partition
identity_model.tenant_binding: via UserCustomerMembership table only — User table MUST NOT contain a direct CustomerId FK
identity_model.migration: V004_UserCustomerMembership.sql — includes LanguageId INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1
identity_model.profile_access_model: ProfileUserMappings (ProfileId, UserId) — many-to-many. Profiles.UserId FK removed in V009. A profile belongs to exactly one Customer; a user may access 0..N profiles per customer via mapping rows. Access queries MUST use INNER JOIN ProfileUserMappings.
rules: A User MAY belong to multiple Customers via UserCustomerMembership
CustomerId MUST NOT be inferred during pre-authentication
After authentication, system MUST resolve or select active Customer context
If user has one membership → auto-select
If user has multiple memberships → require explicit selection before issuing JWT
JWT MUST include selected CustomerId as active context
JWT MUST include LanguageId from UserCustomerMembership as active context
No additional query is allowed to resolve LanguageId after customer selection
All post-auth queries MUST include CustomerId
forbidden: binding User directly to a single Customer
optional or nullable LanguageId on membership
resolving LanguageId via a post-selection query

result_pattern.rule: handlers never throw for business errors

rules: Profile is a first-class, co-equal data partition alongside Customer — NOT optional or secondary
ProfileId MUST remain in JWT and ICurrentUser — this is architecturally binding
ProfileId > 0 MUST be enforced before any protected business operation
profileId == 0 is a security gap: it bypasses all address restriction checks — it is NOT a valid runtime context
JWT MAY carry ProfileId(0) only as a short-lived placeholder between customer selection and profile selection
All capability checks (e.g. DoesProfileHaveRole) require a resolved ProfileId > 0
Profile resolution (SelectProfile) MUST precede any operation that reads ProfileId
forbidden: treating profileId == 0 as a valid operating state
using ProfileId for authorization/filtering/data access when value is 0
implementing any downstream feature that reads ProfileId before profile enforcement is in place
making Profile optional or nullable in the runtime model
profile_model.enforcement_step: COMPLETE — Steps 11+12 done: IRequireProfile marker + RequireProfileBehavior enforce ProfileId > 0 at pipeline level

sequence: 3. Update FindUserByEmail.sql — omit CustomerId (pre-auth exception applies) [DONE]
4. Implement post-auth membership resolution in LoginHandler [DONE]
5. Update JWT claims — include resolved CustomerId [DONE]
6. Add LanguageId to ICurrentUser and full auth flow [DONE]
8–10. Remove Users.CustomerId, fix test infrastructure, add SelectCustomer coverage [DONE]
11. SelectProfile flow — resolve ProfileId from Profiles, replace ProfileId(0) placeholder, persist in UserRefreshTokens
12. Add IRequireProfile marker + AuthorizationBehavior enforcement of ProfileId > 0
13. Enforce ProfileId > 0 in capability gates; remove unrestricted-access bypass for profileId == 0
14. Align JWT/runtime profile source to a single canonical source (Profiles table at selection time)
15. Profile model refactor — Profiles.UserId FK removed; access via ProfileUserMappings (many-to-many) [DONE]
hard_rules: no localization feature may be implemented while LoginHandler reads CustomerId from Users directly
LanguageId placement MUST be decided as part of identity_refactor, not during localization sprint
no localization feature may be implemented before Profile enforcement (Steps 11–14) is complete
profileId == 0 MUST NOT be used for authorization, filtering, data access, or business logic
do not start sequence step N+1 before step N is complete and green
tracked_violations: VIOLATION-001: RESOLVED — FindUserByEmail.sql is now a pure identity query
VIOLATION-002: RESOLVED — LoginHandler uses UserCustomerMembership for post-auth resolution
VIOLATION-004: IsImpersonating/OriginalUserId are dead code — ImpersonatedUserId claim never set in any token
VIOLATION-005: RESOLVED (Step 11) — LoginHandler ProfileId(0) placeholder eliminated; auto-resolve or NeedsProfileSelection returned
VIOLATION-006: RESOLVED (Step 11) — FindMembership.sql COALESCE(p.[Id], 0) removed; profile resolution is a separate GetProfilesAsync step
VIOLATION-007: RESOLVED (Step 12) — RequireProfileBehavior added; blocks ProfileId <= 0 for all IRequireProfile-marked requests
